steps.title: Evaluate the list
steps.content: The choices all use the same $x$-values: $-1$, $0$, and $1$. Evaluate $g(x)=11x+4$ at each input to get the needed output row: $$g(-1)=-7,\quad g(0)=4,\quad g(1)=15.$$

steps.title: Confirm by direct substitution
steps.content: Substitute each input: $$g(-1)=11(-1)+4=-7$$ $$g(0)=11(0)+4=4$$ $$g(1)=11(1)+4=15$$ So the correct table must pair $-1$ with $-7$, $0$ with $4$, and $1$ with $15$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A starts with $g(-1)=7$, but it should be $-7$. Choice B starts with $g(-1)=-4$, also wrong. Choice D shows the outputs for $11x$, not $11x+4$. Choice C shows $-7$, $4$, and $15$ in order, so choice C is correct.
